title: Extracting updates from different items, and consolidating or categorize them topics using AI
excerpt: I realize that often, there are too many similar kind of discussions or Updates across different items, boards. Monday.com should use AI to do the extraction of the Updates discussions, then consolidates or groups or cat…

posts.author: maxting (Max Ting)
posts.cookedHtml: I realize that often, there are too many similar kind of discussions or Updates across different items, boards. Monday.com should use AI to do the extraction of the Updates discussions, then consolidates or groups or categorizes them into relevant topics.
